emails.subject: Cilco Storage Withdrawal
emails.body: Cilco Storage Withdrawal Daren Can you set up a deal for the Cilco withdrawal for Dec. 99 going forward? I know a deal has never been set up for this but volume management wants a deal set up so they won't have to set up an accounting arrangement evey month. Please let me know, I'd appreciate it. Thanks. Aimee

emails.subject: Re: Cilco Storage Withdrawal
emails.body: Re: Cilco Storage Withdrawal We have no way to input a storage deal for Cilco. The way that the contract is set up, does not fit into the systems as they are. D Aimee Lannou 02/04/2000 09:31 AM
